title: Reusable Food Step Infographic

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable food step infographic with clean instructional food layout with numbered English step labels, overhead clarity, and readable process structure. clear recipe process infographic. large numbered cooking panels. short labels with strong food photos. final dish hero image Dish Name: stir-fried pork with chili peppers. Main Ingredients: thin pork slices, green chili peppers, garlic, scallions, soy sauce, and hot oil. Step Sequence: five large numbered steps: prep, marinate, sear, add peppers, glaze and serve. Layout System: vertical Xiaohongshu-style step board with numbered process panels, ingredient closeups, and final hero dish. Photo Style: photorealistic food photography with steam, wok heat, glossy sauce, and warm kitchen light. Text System: one clear title plus five short step labels only. Subject: Make stir-fried pork with chili peppers the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in a clean kitchen or tabletop recipe-board context with food closeups, numbered steps, arrows, and final dish hero image. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use 5 large numbered step panels plus one final hero dish image. Keep ingredients in a small visual row, not many tiny labels. Style and Rendering: Render in photorealistic food photography with steam, wok heat, glossy sauce, and warm kitchen light. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use warm appetizing food colors balanced with clean white or light neutral card backgrounds. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.

imagePrompts.title: Food Step Infographic Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable food step infographic with clean instructional food layout with numbered English step labels, overhead clarity, and readable process structure. clear recipe process infographic. large numbered cooking panels. short labels with strong food photos. final dish hero image Dish Name: black pepper beef rice bowl. Main Ingredients: beef strips, onion, bell pepper, rice, black pepper sauce, sesame, and scallions. Step Sequence: five large numbered steps: prep, marinate, sear, add peppers, glaze and serve. Layout System: clean RedNote recipe infographic with six equal panels, arrow flow, and final dish photo at the bottom. Photo Style: bright home-cooking realism, appetizing sauce shine, shallow depth of field, and crisp ingredient texture. Text System: one clear title plus five short step labels only. Subject: Make black pepper beef rice bowl the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in a clean kitchen or tabletop recipe-board context with food closeups, numbered steps, arrows, and final dish hero image. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
